subject: Team meeting at 3pm today
body: Hi team, please join our weekly sync at 3pm in conference room B. Agenda: project updates and Q4 planning.

subject: Project deadline reminder
body: Just a reminder that the project deliverables are due this Friday. Please make sure everything is submitted on time.

subject: Your leave request has been approved
body: Your leave request for December 25-27 has been approved. Please ensure your work is covered before you leave.

subject: New company policy update
body: Please review the updated work from home policy attached. The new policy takes effect from next Monday.

subject: Client presentation tomorrow
body: Reminder that we have an important client presentation tomorrow at 10am. Please review the slides and be prepared.

subject: Invoice #1234 is due
body: Invoice #1234 for $5,000 is due for payment by end of this week. Please process it at your earliest convenience.

subject: Performance review scheduled
body: Your annual performance review has been scheduled for next Tuesday at 2pm. Please prepare a self assessment beforehand.

subject: Server maintenance tonight
body: The servers will be down for maintenance tonight from 11pm to 2am. Please save all your work before then.

subject: Welcome to the team!
body: Please join me in welcoming John Smith who is joining our team as a Senior Developer starting Monday.

subject: Quarterly report due next week
body: All department heads please submit your quarterly reports by next Friday for the board meeting.

subject: Training session on Friday
body: There will be a mandatory training session on data security this Friday from 2-4pm. Please mark your calendars.

subject: Office will be closed on Monday
body: Please note that the office will be closed on Monday for the public holiday. Normal operations resume Tuesday.
